en: You know, when I first got sober,
I remember, like, freaking out about some bullshit
ko: 별거 아닌 거 가지고 난리 치면서

en: and being like, nobody's gonna understand this.
ko: 아무도 이해 못 할 거라고 했어.

en: Nobody gets me because I'm so fucking special.
ko: 아무도 날 이해 못 해, 나는 너무 특별해서.

en: And my combination of, like, addiction and trauma
and mental illness is so special
that nobody's gonna fucking understand it.
And my mom was like, Rosebud, nobody needs you that much.
ko: 근데 엄마가 그러셨어, 로즈버드, 아무도 널 그렇게 필요로 안 해.

en: And she was like, and that should be a relief to you.
ko: 그리고 그게 안심이 돼야 한다고 하셨어.

en: She was like, that should be a huge relief.
And it kind of blew my mind.
